headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies secured a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell pitching 5.0 innings and 3 strikeouts. The Detroit Tigers defeated the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, with Andrés Giménez collecting 1 hit and 2 RBIs, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought 7-6 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, led by Matt McLain's 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 runs driven in.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Matt Waldron, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the San Diego Padres due to a right brachialis muscle injury. Other injured players include Blake Snell (Los Angeles Dodgers), Chase Dollander (Colorado Rockies), Cal Raleigh (Seattle Mariners), Jimmy Herget (Colorado Rockies), Brooks Kriske (Athletics), Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins), and Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets).

The Baltimore Orioles have made a significant move, acquiring RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded LHP José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. Additionally, the Arizona Diamondbacks acquired OF Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for CF Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a come-from-behind victory, outscoring the Pittsburgh Pirates 11-9. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a crucial win. Zack Littell led the Nationals to victory, pitching 5.0 innings with 3 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Waldron on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-handed pitcher Matt Waldron has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. This move adds depth to the Orioles' pitching staff.
